history.text: Lithuania first appeared in written records, anchoring the start of its documented history.
Grand Duchy ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Coronation of Mindaugas appears in Lithuania's historical record.
Union with Poland tied the territory into a wider political structure.
Commonwealth created appears in Lithuania's historical record.
Partitioned changed control of the territory.
Lithuania restored independence after a period of foreign rule, occupation or union.
Soviet occupation changed control of the territory.

worthSeeing.title: Vilnius Baroque:
worthSeeing.text: The largest surviving medieval old town in northern Europe, UNESCO listed.

worthSeeing.title: Hill of Crosses:
worthSeeing.text: A pilgrimage hill near Siauliai covered in over 100,000 crosses.

worthSeeing.title: Curonian Spit:
worthSeeing.text: A 98 km sand dune peninsula shared with Russia, UNESCO listed.
